robSynth: Robust Synthetic Data Generation

Source: R/robSynth-package.R
robSynth-package.Rd

Robust synthetic data generation methods that protect data quality from contaminated training data. Replaces the conditional models in sequential synthesis with MM-estimators (continuous) and weighted logistic regression (categorical).

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/statistikat/robSynth

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/statistikat/robSynth/issues
